summary: Full backend + frontend testing of Emergent Deploy Panel. 19/19 pytest backend tests pass. UI end-to-end flow (login -> dashboard -> projects list -> add-project wizard 4 steps -> project detail with config save -> deploy -> logs tab -> start/stop/restart -> delete -> settings) all working. Token secrecy verified (github_token never returned; has_github_token=true). Auth guards return 401 on unprotected calls. Ports auto-assigned frontend=3100, backend=8100. Settings shows correct capabilities (git & nginx available; docker/docker_compose/certbot missing as expected in sandbox).

integration_issues.flow: Deploy Logs tab immediately after clicking Deploy
integration_issues.issue: LogViewer shows empty-state text 'Run a deploy to see build output here.' for ~a few seconds after Deploy is clicked. Polling interval is 3s so logs eventually appear. Minor UX polish: could show 'Waiting for logs...' or force an immediate fetch when action() completes.

action_items: (Optional polish) After clicking Deploy/Start/Stop/Restart, force an immediate loadLogs() so the log viewer shows the just-created deploy_logs entry without waiting up to 3s for the next poll.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py CORS middleware is added AFTER routes are included; FastAPI accepts this but conventionally middleware is added before include_router. Not a bug (CORS still works) but could confuse readers.
server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown'); consider lifespan handlers (FastAPI recommendation).
auth.py TOKEN_TTL_HOURS=168 (7 days) — acceptable for a single-admin panel but a shorter TTL or refresh endpoint would be more secure.
auth.py brute-force lockout after N failed logins is NOT implemented; playbook_testing_instructions requested this. Consider adding rate-limit / lockout for /auth/login.
deploy_engine.py detect_capabilities() is cached at DeployEngine.__init__ and never refreshed; if user installs docker later, panel keeps reporting missing until backend restart.
_apply_nginx writes to /etc/nginx/... which will fail (PermissionError) unless panel runs as root on the VPS — handled with try/except but the user should be told in Settings.
No pagination on /api/projects/{id}/logs; long-running deploys will accumulate large log documents (single Mongo doc grows unbounded via $push).

server.py CORS uses CORS_ORIGINS='*' with allow_credentials=True — browsers will reject this combination. Not currently an issue since JWT is in localStorage (not cookies), but if cookie-auth is added, this must be tightened.
seed_data_creation: Tests create+delete a project named 'TEST Sample App' (backend) and 'TEST UI App' (frontend) using octocat/Hello-World repo. All cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py can be reused as regression. Login route uses /api/auth/login (JWT Bearer, stored in localStorage 'panel_token'). Dashboard is at '/' (not '/dashboard'). Deploy WILL end in status='error' with message 'Docker not available (artifacts ready)' — this is CORRECT sandbox behavior. Nginx configs are written to /app/panel_data/nginx/<slug>.conf, docker-compose/Dockerfiles to /app/panel_data/apps/<slug>/ during deploy (cleaned on delete).
rca of the issue: N/A - no functional bugs found. Optional polish item on log viewer polling described in action_items.
